preconditioning_test.label: Preconditioning test
preconditioning_test.intent: Verify that a fresh cell reaches a stable start-of-test capacity before it enters the rest of the programme.
applications: Incoming cell batch screening before ageing or power tests
required_equipment: Battery cell tester with adequate current headroom

steps.name: Ambient equilibration
steps.details: Let the cell sit in the laboratory until its temperature is stable at ambient conditions within approximately +/-2 C.

steps.name: Manufacturer charge
steps.details: Charge at the manufacturer-recommended rate, then complete the CV taper using the standard-cycle cut-off current.

steps.name: Reference discharge block
steps.details: Rest for {rest_minutes} minutes, discharge at the standard-cycle rate to {discharge_cutoff_v} V, then rest for {rest_minutes} minutes before recharging.

steps.name: Repeat until stable
steps.details: Repeat the charge-rest-discharge-rest block for at least 3 cycles and extend up to 10 discharges if successive discharge capacities still differ by more than 2%.

data_acquisition: Record discharge capacity for every preconditioning cycle.
Track cell temperature and confirm it remains within manufacturer limits.

graphs: Cell temperature vs time during the final stabilization cycle

planner_notes: Do not shorten the minimum three-cycle requirement just because the first cycle looks stable.

strict_reference_policy.summary: Keep the 3-cycle minimum, 2% stability gate, and 10-cycle cap fixed. Review is only for manufacturer-specific rate details and lab-specific ambient setup.
tailorable_fields: final lab ambient setpoint within the stable ambient envelope

standard_cycle.label: Standard cycle
standard_cycle.intent: Run the white-paper reference cycle used to derive and follow capacity with a defined discharge, CC-CV charge, and CV discharge completion.

steps.name: Room-temperature acclimation
steps.details: Acclimate the cell at 25 +/- 2 C before starting the standard cycle.

steps.name: Initial discharge
steps.details: Discharge to {discharge_cutoff_v} V at the reference 1C-equivalent current or the datasheet It rate when declared capacity tracking is required.

steps.name: CC-CV recharge
steps.details: Recharge at the manufacturer-recommended current and complete the CV taper at {charge_voltage_v} V down to C/25.

steps.name: Post-charge rest
steps.details: Rest for {rest_minutes} minutes before the reference discharge.

steps.name: Reference discharge with CV completion
steps.details: Discharge to {discharge_cutoff_v} V at the same reference current, continue in CV mode until the current reaches C/25, then rest for {rest_minutes} minutes.

steps.name: Final recharge
steps.details: Recharge again with the manufacturer-recommended CC-CV charge and rest for {rest_minutes} minutes so the cell exits in a controlled state.

data_acquisition: Record current, voltage, capacity, and temperature through both CC and CV segments.
Keep the discharge and recharge rates traceable to whether the plan follows C1 or datasheet It logic.

graphs: Reference charge and discharge voltage curves
Cell temperature vs time during the standard cycle
tables: C/25 completion status and final cut-off table

strict_reference_policy.summary: Keep the room-temperature envelope, CC-CV charge, reference discharge, and CV completion locked. Only the choice between C1 and datasheet It logic should move after review.
locked_planning_fields: reference discharge followed by CV discharge to C/25
tailorable_fields: C1 versus datasheet It rate choice
final reporting label for declared-capacity tracking
